name: RollingSky2
short_description: As a sequel to a world renowned rhythm game “Rolling sky”, Rolling sky2 is a game where you can easily initiate an incredibly marvelous adventure by simple finger movements. Featuring challenging missions yet beginner-friendly gaming experience, the game is also a combination of anime movie and top-notch original soundtrack which will...
detailed_description:
As a sequel to a world renowned rhythm game “Rolling sky”, Rolling sky2 is a game where you can easily initiate an incredibly marvelous adventure by simple finger movements.

Featuring challenging missions yet beginner-friendly gaming experience, the game is also a combination of anime movie and top-notch original soundtrack which will definitely get you hooked!

【How to play】
Tap the screen with the rhythm of music to avoid various objects.

【Features】
●A playable anime movie with magical journey stimulating both visual and auditory sensation.
●Original soundtracks
●Beginner-friendly and suitable for all players of different levels
●Unique missions and gaming rules combine with abundant stories and music
